world.title: Heartburn in New Delhi over Pakistan’s role in brokering Middle East ceasefire
world.description: NEW DELHI: India is experiencing some heartburn over Pakistan's visible role in negotiating the ceasefire between Iran and the US – a challenge to its own ambitions as the South Asian regional hegemon and a global player.

world.title: Over 3,300 evacuated from Iran to Azerbaijan over the whole period of war
world.description: A total of 3,379 people have been evacuated from Iran to Azerbaijan between 08:00 on February 28 and 10:00 on April 8, as evacuation operations continue amid ongoing regional tensions, AzerNEWS reports.

world.title: India could see phased recovery in crude supplies post ceasefire, LNG recovery to take time
world.description: In a de-escalation scenario, a halt in hostilities by April or May could support a phased recovery, with transits normalising by July. Insurance coverage and infrastructure repairs would slow the pace of full commercial return, commodity analytics firm Kpler noted.

world.title: Education International members raise their voices in solidarity with teachers and students devastated by the war in the Middle East
world.description: Education International (EI) brought together education unionists from across the globe for a solidarity webinar with member organisations impacted by the war in the Middle East. During the online gathering, which featured teachers and unionists directly impacted by the war, EI members reiterated a call for an immediate ceasefire, the protection of school communities and a commitment to peace in the region.

world.title: North Korea launches ballistic missiles after declaring South 'most hostile enemy'
world.description: The back-to-back launches came after Pyongyang made it clear that it had no intention of improving ties with Seoul, whose government steadfastly expressed its hopes of restoring long-dormant dialogue.

world.title: Maersk says US-Iran ceasefire may create Strait of Hormuz transit opportunities
world.description: COPENHAGEN: Danish shipping group Maersk said on Wednesday that the ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran may create transit opportunities for vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, but that it did not yet provide full maritime certainty.

ai.title: Doctor vs Google: Self-Diagnosis Risks & Delayed Treatment in India
ai.description: In the digital age, many rely on online searches and AI tools for self-diagnosis, but experts warn that this can delay treatment and increase health risks. Misinterpreting symptoms often leads to wrong care and late detection of diseases like cancer and diabetes. Doctors stress that online information lacks clinical context, making professional consultation and regular screening essential for better health outcomes. , Health, Times Now

The move highlights intense competition for AI talent, as Prometheus expands rapidly with major funding and hiring from top tech firms like Meta, Google DeepMind, and OpenAI.
